description: Pedestrians walking across a clean city crossing. Well-spaced, minimal occlusion.
People sitting on benches and walking in a park under bright daylight.
Patrons at an outdoor cafe. Some sitting, some standing. Good illumination.
Shopping mall main concourse. Multiple floor levels, some scale variations and overlap.
Busy metropolitan shopping street. Overlaps, background clutter, and perspective scale shifts.
Indoor music concert crowd facing the stage. Low lighting, colorful spotlights, back views.
Protesters marching down a wide street. High level of body occlusion and overlapping heads.
Spectators seated in a large sports stadium during the day. Repetitive patterns, head-only visibility.
Outdoor city festival parade. Extremely packed heads, high density, distant heads are tiny pixels.
Subway station transit rush hour. Mixed motion blur, indoor neon lighting, heavy overlap.
Crowd waving flags and signs in an outdoor political speech. Hand movements, occlusions.
Spectator stand during a match. Rapid cheering movements, changing illumination, extreme perspective.
Massive religious festival procession. Heavy shoulder-to-shoulder pack, slow moving wave, extreme scale changes.
Protesters walking holding banners. Banners blocking people, moving cameras, variable perspective.
Pedestrians crossing a busy urban street intersection. High angle view, mix of people and vehicles.
